title: The biomass must grow
description: a datapack that adds extra recipes betewn fungal infection spore and create
body:
A minecraft datapack/mod that will give u toons of new recipes from fungal infection spore that make use of the create mechanics to have cheaper or different recipes for many items!

Now, bile will be one of the most inportant resources of the mod, due to the fact that now with bile you will be able to create biomass, living cores, reagments and other items.

Biomass mixed with other ingredients or alone will be able to make all the different types of biomass blocks, and every biomass block will be able to be crushed/milled to get a toon of different infected parts, be carefull tho, every type of biomass block has a different loot table of spore items that they can give.

keep in mind that u will be able to heat gastric biomass and crusted bile to get bile, if u use this mechanic carefully, u will be able to even have a infinite biomass/infected items factory.

also, keep in mind that mechanic items such as cdus will have cheaper recipes if u use automatic assembly.

If u wana see all the recipes of the datapack, i recommend u use JEI, tho u will be able to see some recipes of the datapack in gallery.

UPDATE!!!
now it also adds recipes for farmer's delight!!!
